retry_reason: Failure indicates no mapping exists or the mapping is corrupted; retrying is unlikely to succeed without external changes.
contract_summary: This function is a get-wrapper that retrieves a chunk map from the filesystem info by logical address and returns it with an acquired reference. It validates that the found map covers the requested range; if validation fails, it releases the map and returns an error. The caller is responsible for releasing the reference by calling btrfs_free_chunk_map when done. The function reports critical errors via btrfs_crit but does not handle transient conditions, so retry on failure is not recommended.
